name: Noodles in Sesame Sauce
recipeIngredient: Topped with roasted sesame seeds, chopped coriander leaves, and julienned carrots/cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles until al dente. Drain and rinse in cool water, then pat dry.
2. (Optional) Store oiled cooked noodles in the fridge for several days.
3. To make sauce: In a small skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Sauté onions, garlic, ginger, and chili peppers until garlic is soft but not brown. Turn off heat and add vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, sesame paste, and chicken stock. Simmer sauce for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in sesame oil and let cool to room temperature.
5. Pour the cooled sauce over chilled noodles and mix well.
6. Heap noodles onto a serving platter and garnish with sesame seeds, chopped coriander leaves, and julienned vegetables.
